views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Shows today's habit checklist with completion ring, current streaks per habit, and quick-complete buttons. The hero element is a large progress ring showing X/Y habits done today, surrounded by individual habit cards users can tap to mark complete.

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick-add or log a habit completion. Pre-populates with known habits from history. Category picker, optional duration stepper (0-120 min), satisfaction slider (1-5 stars), and time-of-day selector. Supports both 'new habit' and 'log existing habit' flows.

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: GitHub-style calendar heatmap showing daily completion rates (color intensity = % habits done). Below the heatmap, date-grouped list of individual habit logs with completion status, duration, and satisfaction. Filter by habit name or category.

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Multi-section analytics: (1) Weekly completion rate trend line chart, (2) Per-habit completion rate bar chart, (3) Best day-of-week radar/bar chart, (4) Category breakdown donut, (5) AI-style insight cards like 'Your meditation streak is at 14 days — your longest yet!' and 'You complete 23% more habits on Mondays than Fridays'.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayCompletedCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of unique habits marked completed today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayTotalHabits
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of unique habits logged today (completed or not)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayCompletionRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: todayCompletedCount / todayTotalHabits as percentage (0-100)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: activeHabits
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Unique habit names seen in last 14 days, sorted by frequency. Used to pre-populate entry sheet.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: overallStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days where ALL tracked habits were completed (100% completion rate). Breaks if any day has <100%.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: longestOverallStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All-time longest overall streak for display as personal best

viewModelComputedProperties.name: perHabitStreaks
viewModelComputedProperties.description: For each active habit, calculate its individual current and best streak. A habit's streak = consecutive days it appears as completed.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyCompletionRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average daily completion rate over the current Mon-Sun week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: previousWeekCompletionRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Same metric for prior week, used to compute trend direction

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Comparison: 'improving' if current > previous by >5%, 'declining' if lower by >5%, else 'stable'. Include delta percentage.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: completionRateByDayOfWeek
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average completion rate per weekday over last 4 weeks. Reveals which days user is most/least consistent.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: mostConsistentHabit
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Habit with highest completion rate over last 30 days (minimum 7 data points)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: leastConsistentHabit
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Habit with lowest completion rate over last 30 days — candidate for insight nudge

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Entries grouped by HabitCategory with count and completion rate for donut chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily completion rate for last 8 weeks as time-series for line chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: perHabitChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Completion rate per habit for horizontal bar chart, sorted descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: heatmapData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last 90 days of daily completion rates (0.0-1.0) for calendar heatmap coloring

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Generated insight strings: streak milestones, consistency trends, best/worst day alerts, habit-specific encouragement, and week-over-week comparisons

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageDailyDuration
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average total minutes spent on all habits per day over last 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalCompletionsAllTime
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Lifetime count of completed habit entries for milestone gamification

dailyGoal.description: Complete all tracked habits each day. The system infers which habits are 'active' by looking at habits logged in the last 14 days. A day is considered 100% when all active habits are marked completed.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: Overall streak: consecutive calendar days where every active habit is completed (100% rate). Per-habit streak: consecutive days that specific habit appears as completed. A missed day breaks the streak. Weekends count — habits are daily commitments. Grace: if a habit was not logged at all on a day (vs logged as not-completed), it does not break that habit's individual streak but DOES reduce overall completion rate.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Primary: weekly completion rate (current week vs previous week, expressed as +/- percentage points). Secondary: per-habit 7-day rolling completion rate compared to 30-day baseline. Tertiary: day-of-week consistency pattern to identify strong/weak days. Duration trend: average minutes spent per day, 7-day vs 30-day.
insights: Streak milestone alerts: 'You've meditated 7 days straight! That's a new record.' at 7, 14, 21, 30, 50, 100 day marks
Consistency winner: 'Journaling is your most consistent habit at 92% completion rate'
Struggling habit nudge: 'Exercise has dropped to 40% this week — down from 75% last month'
Day-of-week pattern: 'You complete 30% more habits on Mondays than Fridays — consider lighter Friday goals'
Week-over-week trend: 'Great week! Your completion rate improved from 68% to 85%'
Category balance: 'All your habits are Health-related — consider adding a Mindfulness or Learning habit'
Duration insight: 'You spend an average of 47 minutes daily on habits — up 12 minutes from last month'
Comeback detection: 'Welcome back! You logged habits after a 3-day gap — your meditation streak resets but you can rebuild it'
